_publications._publicationTitle: Applying microsatellite multiplex PCR analysis (MMPA) for determining allele copy-number status and percentage of normal cells within tumors.

_contextSnippet: MMPA showed a high degree of sensitivity and accuracy. For the study of neurofibromas and the MMPA setup described here, most microsatellites (∼82%) showing AI were correctly determining the copy-number status and the AI-mechanism
details: Showed high degree of sensitivity and accuracy for neurofibromas analysis - ~82% of microsatellites showing AI correctly determined copy-number status and AI-mechanism
